Metadata.title: Kkebi · Private Van Service
Metadata.description: Premium private transfers from Incheon Airport — reliable, comfortable door-to-door service with Kkebi.

home.title: Private Van Transfer Seoul & Incheon Airport Taxi - Kkebi
home.description: Incheon Airport Transfer and Incheon Airport Private Van in one service: book Kkebi for door-to-door rides from Incheon and Gimpo, fixed-fare van service across Seoul and Gyeonggi, and punctual pickups you can count on.

inquiry.title: Kkebi Guide & Contact Us | FAQ and Online Inquiry
inquiry.description: Service guide and FAQ, including routes beyond Greater Seoul, plus a structured 1:1 online inquiry form.

support.title: Kkebi Support — FAQ & Online Inquiry | Private Airport Van
support.description: FAQs for Greater Seoul and beyond, booking and payment, plus an online inquiry form. Call or Kakao for immediate assistance.

Support.heroDesc: Review service notes and frequently asked questions, then send a structured inquiry when you are ready. We respond with the same calm, punctual care as every Kkebi ride.
Support.faq1Q: Do you serve areas outside the Greater Seoul region?
Support.faq1A: Yes. Routes not listed on the fare table—regional or long-distance legs—are quoted case by case from your schedule and route. Check “Non–Greater Seoul inquiry” in the form below, or call or message us for a quick review.
Support.faq2Q: How do I make a reservation?
Support.faq2A: Use the online booking flow or reach us by phone or Kakao with your pickup/drop-off, time, headcount, and luggage. We confirm details and finalize your booking after a short consultation. For urgent needs, a phone call is fastest.
Support.faq3A: We walk you through available options when your itinerary is confirmed—cash, bank transfer, and other methods as agreed. Your consultant will share specifics at the confirmation step.
Support.faq4A: Round trips and returns are quoted as fixed-fare packages that reflect waiting time and whether a return leg is included. Please note any round trip in the remarks so we can align the quote.
Support.faq5Q: What if we have a lot of luggage?
Support.faq5A: Share suitcase, golf, and child-equipment counts in advance and we will match you with a vehicle that fits—loaded and handled with the same attention as our typical airport runs.
Support.formDesc: Submit the form and we will get back to you. For immediate help, pick a channel below or call us directly.
Support.fieldOutOfMetro: This inquiry is outside Greater Seoul / not on the fare table
Support.fieldOutOfMetroHint: If your trip is regional or custom, check this box and describe the route as clearly as you can.
Support.placeholderMessage: Flight number, car seats, extra stops, etc.
Support.success: Your message was received. We will contact you shortly.
Support.errorGeneric: We could not send your inquiry. Please try again or call us.
Support.validationRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
Support.validationPhone: Please enter a valid phone number.
Support.contactSectionDesc: Choose a channel, confirm, then we will connect you.
Support.submitHint: After your inquiry is received, KakaoTalk will open in a new tab.

hero.title: The most comfortable start to every journey—a stable concierge partner for guest satisfaction
hero.desc: <brand>Kkebi</brand> delivers dedicated concierge service from booking to your destination—built around Incheon Airport Transfer and Seoul Private Transfer needs, with Incheon Airport Private Van–level care for each guest: seamless, safe, and tailored to you.

IntroPage.coreValueBody: We manage every touchpoint from booking to arrival under one operating standard—refinement over flash—for steady, composed airport transfers.
IntroPage.representativeLine: It is our privilege to serve you with care.

s01.title: Private airport concierge
s01.body: Calm, precise coordination from arrival flow through boarding—aligned with your inbound journey.

s02.title: Executive Business Mobility
s02.body: We map Executive Business Mobility around your day—whether you need an Incheon Airport Transfer, door-to-door Incheon Airport Private Van service, or a Seoul Private Transfer between appointments—for a seamless, safe, and flawless experience tailored to your schedule.

s03.title: Family & child-friendly care
s03.body: Luggage, boarding flow, and stops planned in advance for a relaxed ride.

s04.title: Late-night & dawn safe operation
s04.body: The same standards apply after hours—we stay responsive until you arrive safely.

VehicleFleet.sectionDesc: Choose the right Staria, Solati, or County for your headcount and schedule.
